title: A song of ascents. Of David.

verses.1: I was glad when they said to me, “Let us go to the house of the LORD.”
verses.2: Our feet are standing in your gates, O Jerusalem.
verses.3: Jerusalem is built up as a city united together,
verses.4: where the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, as a testimony for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the LORD.
verses.5: For there the thrones of judgment stand, the thrones of the house of David.
verses.6: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: “May those who love you prosper.
verses.7: May there be peace within your walls, and prosperity inside your fortresses.”
verses.8: For the sake of my brothers and friends, I will say, “Peace be within you.”
verses.9: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God, I will seek your prosperity.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
